name: The sons of Esau
notes: Chronicles reproduces the Edomite line of Esau set down in Genesis 36, the same names in the same order: the sons of Esau, the sons of Eliphaz and of Reuel, the sons of Seir the Horite who inhabited the land, the kings that reigned in Edom before any king reigned over Israel, and the dukes of Edom. The Chronicler compresses the record, gathering into a single verse what Genesis spreads across several. Genesis' added detail, Esau's wives of the daughters of Canaan and his dwelling in mount Seir away from the face of his brother Jacob, reads in place as the fuller setting from which the Chronicler draws the names. The two lists stand as complementary vantages on one genealogy.

links.label: Eliphaz ... Reuel
Jeush and Jaalam and Korah ... the sons of Esau
Esau's sons Eliphaz ... Reuel
the sons of Eliphaz were Teman Omar ... and Gatam and Kenaz
Timna ... Amalek
the sons of Reuel Nahath and Zerah Shammah and Mizzah
the sons of Seir ... Lotan and Shobal and Zibeon and Anah
And Dishon and Ezer and Dishan
the children of Lotan were Hori ... and Lotan's sister was Timna
the children of Shobal ... Manahath and Ebal ... and Onam
the children of Zibeon ... and Anah
the children of Anah ... Dishon
the children of Dishon ... and Eshban and Ithran and Cheran
The children of Ezer ... Bilhan ... and Akan
The children of Dishan ... Uz and Aran
the kings that reigned in the land of Edom before ... any king over the children of Israel
Bela the son of Beor ... the name of his city was Dinhabah
Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead
Husham of the land of Temani ... reigned in his stead
Hadad the son of Bedad who smote Midian in the field of Moab ... the name of his city was Avith
Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead
of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead
Baal-hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead
the name of his city was Pau ... his wife's name was Mehetabel the daughter of Matred
duke Timnah ... duke Jetheth
Duke Aholibamah duke Elah duke Pinon
Duke Kenaz duke Teman duke Mibzar
Duke Magdiel duke Iram ... the dukes of Edom
